\tzpentry{ID3876}{Magnetic Helicity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3876 introduces Magnetic Helicity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Omega^k(\mathcal{M}) = \text{Im}(d_{k-1}) \oplus \text{Ker}(\Delta_k) \oplus \text{Im}(\delta_{k+1}) \end{equation}
